description: Add 8 innovative world-class features: AI Care Plan Writer, Predictive Admission Matching, Real-time Wellbeing Heatmap, Automated Regulatory Reporting, Smart Handover Intelligence, Digital Consent Manager, Resident Digital Twin, and Environmental Intelligence. Each feature gets a full backend controller with API endpoints and a frontend page with rich UI.
steps: FEATURE 1 - AI Care Plan Writer: Create backend/src/controllers/aiCarePlan.controller.ts with endpoints: POST /ai/care-plan/generate (takes resident ID, gathers assessment data, calls AI to produce CQC-compliant care plan), GET /ai/care-plans/:residentId (list generated plans), PATCH /ai/care-plans/:id/approve (staff review and approve). Create frontend/src/pages/AiCarePlanWriter.tsx with: resident selector, assessment data summary panel, 'Generate Care Plan' button, live generation status, preview of generated plan with CQC domains (safe/effective/caring/responsive/well-led), approve/reject workflow, version history.

FEATURE 2 - Predictive Admission Matching: Create backend/src/controllers/admissionMatching.controller.ts with: POST /admissions/match (analyzes referral needs vs home capabilities, staff skills, room availability, resident mix), GET /admissions/referrals (list pending referrals), POST /admissions/referrals (create new referral). Create frontend/src/pages/AdmissionMatching.tsx with: referral intake form (care needs, medical conditions, mobility, behavior, preferences), AI matching score display (0-100 with color gradient), detailed reasoning breakdown (capabilities match, staff skills, room suitability, resident compatibility), accept/decline workflow with audit trail.

FEATURE 3 - Real-time Wellbeing Heatmap: Create backend/src/controllers/wellbeingHeatmap.controller.ts with: GET /wellbeing/heatmap (returns room-by-room wellbeing status based on latest mood logs, pain levels, engagement), GET /wellbeing/heatmap/history (time-series of heatmap snapshots). Create frontend/src/pages/WellbeingHeatmap.tsx with: visual grid/floor plan showing rooms as colored cells (green=happy/settled, amber=needs attention, red=distressed/in pain), click a room to see resident details, auto-refresh every 30 seconds, time slider to view historical states, summary stats panel.

FEATURE 4 - Automated Regulatory Reporting: Create backend/src/controllers/regulatoryReporting.controller.ts with: POST /regulatory/generate-notification (auto-generates CQC/safeguarding/DoLS/death notifications from incident data), GET /regulatory/notifications (list all statutory notifications with status), PATCH /regulatory/notifications/:id (update status/submit), GET /regulatory/deadlines (upcoming submission deadlines). Create frontend/src/pages/RegulatoryReporting.tsx with: dashboard of pending notifications by type, auto-populated form previews, deadline countdown timers with urgency colors, submission tracking, complete audit trail, compliance scorecard.

FEATURE 5 - Smart Handover Intelligence: Create backend/src/controllers/smartHandover.controller.ts with: POST /handover/smart-generate (AI identifies top 3 critical items per shift based on clinical urgency, learns from action patterns), GET /handover/smart (list smart handovers), PATCH /handover/smart/:id/action (record actions taken on handover items for learning). Create frontend/src/pages/SmartHandover.tsx with: shift selector, top-3 critical items with urgency badges and clinical reasoning, full handover detail expandable sections, action recording buttons, effectiveness tracking over time, comparison with traditional SBAR.

FEATURE 6 - Digital Consent Manager: Create backend/src/controllers/consentManager.controller.ts with: POST /consents (create consent record), GET /consents/:residentId (list all consents for resident), PATCH /consents/:id (update/review consent), GET /consents/expiring (consents due for review), POST /consents/:id/capacity-assessment (record capacity assessment). Create frontend/src/pages/ConsentManager.tsx with: consent categories (photography, outings, medical treatments, research, DNR), status dashboard per resident, consent form with digital signature capture area, review date tracking, capacity assessment workflow, family involvement tracking, expiry alerts.

FEATURE 7 - Resident Digital Twin: Create backend/src/controllers/digitalTwin.controller.ts with: GET /digital-twin/:residentId (aggregates all data - medical, social, emotional, preferences, relationships, history into unified view), GET /digital-twin/:residentId/timeline (chronological event stream). Create frontend/src/pages/ResidentDigitalTwin.tsx with: comprehensive single-page dashboard with sections for medical summary, social connections, emotional patterns, preferences, key relationships, life story highlights, risk indicators, recent events timeline, wellbeing trend chart, predictive insights - all updating in real-time with auto-refresh.

FEATURE 8 - Environmental Intelligence: Create backend/src/controllers/environmentalIntel.controller.ts with: POST /environment/readings (log environmental readings - noise, light, temperature, air quality), GET /environment/dashboard (current readings by zone), GET /environment/correlations (correlate environmental data with wellbeing outcomes), GET /environment/recommendations (AI-generated optimization suggestions). Create frontend/src/pages/EnvironmentalIntelligence.tsx with: zone-based dashboard showing current readings, time-of-day charts for each metric, correlation visualization (scatter plots of temperature vs mood etc.), AI recommendations panel, historical comparisons, optimal condition presets.
Register all new routes in backend/src/routes/index.ts following existing patterns with appropriate middleware (authenticate, tenantGuard, isManager/isClinical/isStaff)
Register all new pages in frontend/src/App.tsx - add imports, add to NAV_ALL array with appropriate icons and role restrictions, add Route elements
Add all required TypeScript types to frontend/src/types/index.ts for the new features
Verify both builds still pass with zero errors after adding all new features
acceptance_criteria: All 8 new backend controllers exist with proper route registrations
All 8 new frontend pages exist with rich, functional UIs
All new types are properly defined in frontend/src/types/index.ts
Running 'cd backend && npm run build' completes with zero errors
Running 'cd frontend && npm run build' completes with zero errors
Navigation includes all 8 new features with appropriate role restrictions
Each feature has a visually impressive, production-quality UI
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/backend && npm run build 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS' should output 0
cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/frontend && npm run build 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS' should output 0
